texto: ...remember one thing only: that it's you-nobody else-who determines your destiny and decides your fate. Nobody else can be alive for you
autor: nor can you be alive for anybody else.
explicacao: Citação de nor can you be alive for anybody else. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “...remember one thing only: that it's you-nobody else-who determines your destiny and decides you…” articula reflexao, e-e-cummings, nobody em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
